case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS BASFORD, HELEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BASFORD, HELEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BASFORD, HELEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASFORD, HELEN $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BASFORD, HELEN HEARING SET FOR FEB-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-18-1994, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BASFORD, HELEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
